headline: 3 Cash-Producing Stocks We Find Risky
summary: A company that generates cash isn’t automatically a winner. Some businesses stockpile cash but fail to reinvest wisely, limiting their ability to expand.

headline: Is IDEX (IEX) Pricing Look Attractive After Recent Share Price Pullback
summary: If you are wondering whether IDEX is fairly priced at around US$197.90 per share, you are not alone. Valuation is exactly what this article will focus on. The stock has seen a 6.4% decline over the last week and last 30 days, while still sitting on a 10.5% gain year to date and a 7.9% return over the past year, which can change how investors think about both risk and opportunity. Recent news coverage around IDEX has focused on its position in the capital goods sector and how investors are...
